onChange.script:
try:
	    system.perspective.print("currentValue start of block %s" % currentValue.value)
	    system.perspective.print("val0 in text change %s" % self.props.text)
	
	    if currentValue.value not in [False, 0, None, ''] and str(currentValue.value).strip() != '':
	        rowData = self.view.params.rowData
	        system.perspective.print("scanpart.props.text changeScript rowData = %s" % rowData)
	
	        PartNumber = rowData['PartName']
	        AlternatePart = rowData['AlternatePart']
	        MST_ErrorProof_id = rowData['ErrorProofId']
	
	        system.perspective.print("currentValue inside block = %s" % currentValue.value)
	        system.perspective.print("AlternatePart inside block = %s" % str(AlternatePart))
	
	        # Split and clean AlternatePart list
	        AlternatePartList = [part.strip() for part in AlternatePart.split(",") if part.strip()]
	        system.perspective.print("AlternatePart List: %s" % AlternatePartList)
	
	        # Matching logic
	        match_found = (
	            str(PartNumber).upper() in str(currentValue).upper()
	            or any(str(part).upper() in str(currentValue).upper() for part in AlternatePartList)
	        ) and (
	            len(str(PartNumber)) <= len(str(currentValue))
	            or any(len(str(part)) <= len(str(currentValue)) for part in AlternatePartList)
	        )
	
	        if match_found:
	            PartID = currentValue.value[1:].split("#", 1)[0]
	
	            params = {
	                'MST_Area_Id': self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId,
	                'MST_Line_Id': self.session.custom.CurrentLineId,
	                'MST_Shift_Id': 1,
	                'MST_WorkStation_Id': self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId,
	                'MST_Event_Id': 3,
	                'M_BOM_Id': self.session.custom.BOMId,
	                'OrderNumber': self.session.custom.orderNumber,
	                'SerialNumber': self.session.custom.DashBoardSerialNumber,
	                'MST_OPDefinition_Id': 3,
	                'OperatorID': 1,
	                'IsExceedTime': 0,
	                'MST_Status_Id': 2,
	                'IsActive': 1,
	                'IsDeleted': 0,
	                'CreatedBy': self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId,
	                'PartNumber': PartID,
	                'ConsumedSerialNumber': self.session.custom.DashBoardSerialNumber,
	                'ConsumedPartNumber': currentValue.value,
	                'MST_ErrorProof_id': MST_ErrorProof_id
	            }
	
	            system.perspective.print("scanpart.props.text changeScript Params = %s" % params)
	            system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Quality/checksheet/insertEfData", params)
	            self.props.text = ''
	            system.perspective.sendMessage('RefreshErrorProofingQG', scope='session')
	            system.perspective.print("Val1 in change Script %s" % self.props.text)
	
	            try:
	                system.perspective.print("scanpart.props.text changeScript Data Saved To Logs")
	            except:
	                pass
	
	        else:
	            self.props.text = ''
	            state = 'Warning'
	            message = "Incorrect Part Scan. Please scan or enter the correct part."
	
	            Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(
	                str(state),
	                str(state.capitalize()),
	                str(message),
	                "true",
	                "Okay",
	                "", "", "", "",
	                "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup",
	                "", "", "", ""
	            )
	
	            try:
	                system.perspective.print("scanpart.props.text changeScript Incorrect Part Alert Triggered")
	            except:
	                pass
	
	except Exception as e:
	    system.perspective.print("Error in scanpart.props.text changeScript change: %s" % str(e))

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	system.perspective.print('Scanpart TabErrorFocus inside')
	self.focus()
